title: conioselinum nepalense
intro: Conioselinum nepalense, also known as Himalayan Queen fern or Nepal Queen fern, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. Conioselinum nepalense is said to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
